title: Clinical Badgers outplay Rhinos in T20
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers...
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"George van Heerden and his troops secured a five-wicket victory against the dangerous Mpumalanga Rhinos at the REC Cricket Stadium in Oudtshoorn on Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
